top3.sql:
SELECT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage';

SELECT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.isFullArt = 0
  AND c.isOversized = 0
  AND c.isPromo = 0
  AND c.isReprint = 0
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%split%' 
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%transform%' 
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%modal%' 
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage'
  AND l.status IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage';

SELECT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.isFullArt = 0
  AND c.isOversized = 0
  AND c.isPromo = 0
  AND c.isReprint = 0
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%split%' 
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%transform%' 
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%modal%' 
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage'
  AND l.status IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.type LIKE '%Artifact%'
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.isFullArt = 0
  AND c.isOversized = 0
  AND c.isPromo = 0
  AND c.isReprint = 0
  AND c.frameVersion NOT IN ('split', 'transform', 'modal', 'double_faced')
  AND l.format = 'vintage'
  AND l.status IS NOT NULL;

SELECT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage';

SELECT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.isFullArt = 0
  AND c.isOversized = 0
  AND c.isPromo = 0
  AND c.isReprint = 0
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%split%' 
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%transform%' 
  AND c.frameVersion NOT LIKE '%modal%' 
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage'
  AND l.status IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.type LIKE '%Artifact%'
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.isFullArt = 0
  AND c.isOversized = 0
  AND c.isPromo = 0
  AND c.isReprint = 0
  AND c.frameVersion NOT IN ('split', 'transform', 'modal', 'double_faced')
  AND l.format = 'vintage'
  AND l.status IS NOT NULL;

final.sql:
SELECT l.status
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.isAlternative = 0
  AND c.faceName IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage';
